mapper.insert: INSERT INTO coupon(userId, code, sourceRecycleId, amount, expireTime) VALUES (#{userId}, #{code}, #{sourceRecycleId}, #{amount}, #{expireTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE coupon SET status = 'USED', sourceRecycleId = #{sourceRecycleId}, useTime = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM coupon WHERE userId = #{userId} ORDER BY createTime DESC
